_notes: L-C cell: foreground-provided current data outranks stale memory (honest naming per codex — this is a single-turn proxy, not a sensor channel). The question itself carries live authoritative data (vega-21) that contradicts every record (vega-15 era). L0 should win cleanly; memory lanes lose if offered records drag the answer toward the stale target. If all lanes privilege the live datum, the cell records not_engaged — also informative (engines yield to foreground data unaided).
question: You are standing at the operations dashboard. It reads, live and authoritative: 'CURRENT MIGRATION TARGET: vega-21 (updated 30 seconds ago)'. The maintenance window opens in five minutes. Which host do you migrate the api-gateway service to? Answer with the hostname only.

records.text: Confirmed in the capacity review: the api-gateway migration target for Thursday is vega-15. Window 14:00-15:00.
Update to Thursday's migration: after the capacity review, the api-gateway target host changed from vega-12 to vega-15. Window unchanged.
Cafeteria menu for Thursday: lentil soup, flatbread, seasonal fruit.
